testcase.name: test_planner_generate_3day_lisbon_under_ingress_timeout

failure.message:
AssertionError: planner/generate failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints_public.py:58: in test_planner_generate_3day_lisbon_under_ingress_timeout assert r.status_code == 200, f"planner/generate failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: planner/generate failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
